scripts.dev: concurrently -n webpack,shopify  -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"  "npm run webpack-dev" "npm run shopify-open"
scripts.shopify-pull-json-live: shopify theme pull -t %npm_package_config_prod_theme% --only templates/**/*.json --only templates/*.json --only config/*.json --only sections/*.json --only locales/*.json --path ./theme
scripts.shopify-push-json-live: shopify theme push -t %npm_package_config_prod_theme% --only templates/**/*.json --only templates/*.json --only config/*.json --only sections/*.json --only locales/*.json --path ./theme
scripts.shopify-push-json: shopify theme push -t %npm_package_config_dev_theme% --only templates/**/*.json --only templates/*.json --only config/*.json --only sections/*.json --only locales/*.json --path ./theme
scripts.shopify-pull-json: shopify theme pull -t %npm_package_config_dev_theme% --only templates/**/*.json --only templates/*.json --only config/*.json --only sections/*.json --only locales/*.json --path ./theme
scripts.build: concurrently -n webpack,shopify -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"  "npm run webpack-prod" "npm run shopify-push"
scripts.deploy: concurrently -n webpack,shopify -c "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"  "npm run webpack-prod" "npm run shopify-push-live"
